title: pancratium maximum
intro: Pancratium maximum, also known as the horned pansy or sea pansy, is a bulbous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Pancratium maximum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Pancratium maximum typically involve the use of its bulbs, which can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
